reviews.buyerTranslationFeedback: Excellent screwdriver! Good quality plastic, nice chuck from 0.8 to 10 mm, not everyone can clamp a 0.8 drill bit. Not heavy, fits comfortably in the hand. The perfect torque limiter. I bought it on sale for 1500 rubles. Without a suitcase, but it's not really needed.
reviews.skuInfo: Color:1PC 2.0Ah Battery Plug Type:EU Ships From:Russian Federation

reviews.buyerTranslationFeedback: There is a slight gap in the fit of the Makita battery. The speeds switch a bit slowly. Overall, I liked the screwdriver, especially for such a price.
Very fast delivery, visually made with high quality, everything functions properly.
Not bad screwdriver. Iron chuck, holds bits well, compact, for this price there are no questions about it. You can take it. Torque and speed are insane.
Everything is fine! Lubricated the gearbox and it works perfectly, such a small and powerful thing! Thank you for the good product!
A good screwdriver, I liked it. There is indeed a slight wobble in the bit. But for this price, I think it's an excellent tool.
